zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane Swaithing於1444年出生在英國諾福爾可可藍沃斯時，她的父親Edmund Swaithing28歲，母親Jane Hannah11歲。她和Edward Woodhouse至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1510年在英國諾福爾可吉波利享年66歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可吉波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jane Swaithing于1444年出生在英国諾福爾可可藍沃斯时，她的父亲Edmund Swaithing28岁，母亲Jane Hannah11岁。她和Edward Woodhouse至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1510年在英国諾福爾可吉波利享年66岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可吉波利。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane Swaithing was born in 1444, in Cranworth, Norfolk, England, her father, Edmund Swaithing, was 28 and her mother, Jane Hannah, was 11. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Edward Woodhouse. She died in 1510, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Kimberley, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane Swaithing est née en 1444, à Cranworth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Swaithing, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jane Hannah, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Edward Woodhouse. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane Swaithing 1444 in Cranworth, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Swaithing 28 und ihre Mutter Jane Hannah 11. Sie hatte mit Edward Woodhouse mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Kimberley, Norfolk, England und wurde in Kimberley, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Swaithing è nata il nel 1444 nel Cranworth, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Edmund Swaithing, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Jane Hannah, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Edward Woodhouse. Morì nel 1510, nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Kimberley, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane Swaithingが1444年にイギリスノーフォルククランウオルスで生まれた時，父Edmund Swaithingは28歳，母Jane Hannahは11歳であった。彼女はEdward Woodhouseとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1510年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane Swaithing(이)가 1444년 영국 노르폴크 크랜워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Swaithing(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Hannah(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Edward Woodhouse(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane Swaithing nasceu em 1444, em Cranworth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Swaithing, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Jane Hannah, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Edward Woodhouse. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane Swaithing родилась в 1444 г. в местности кранворт, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Swaithing было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Hannah, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Edward Woodhouse. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane Swaithing nació en 1444, en Cranworth, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Swaithing, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Jane Hannah, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Edward Woodhouse. Murió en 1510, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
